data.name: HeroDesc
data.value: I'm a computer science student and a software developer specializing in building scalable applications. Currently, my main focus is developing reliable architectures using .NET Core, C#, and Entity Framework. I am actively looking for a summer internship opportunity.

data.name: CinemaDesc
data.value: A REST API for movie theater operations designed with a focus on clear separation of concerns and maintainability.

data.name: EsportsDesc
data.value: A web application for managing esports tournaments, featuring role-based access control and automated local database migrations.

data.name: AiDesc
data.value: A containerized backend application that integrates with the Hugging Face API to automatically analyze and extract data from invoices.

data.name: TricityDesc
data.value: Python desktop application that recommends Tricity trails using user preference filtering and weather comfort scoring via the Open-Meteo API.

data.name: DjangoDesc
data.value: Django library management system handling inventory, loans, and reservations. Features an extended admin panel, automated tasks, and reporting tools using Pandas and Matplotlib.

data.name: AisdDesc
data.value: Python implementation of Huffman file compression and a custom min-heap priority queue.

data.name: OopDesc
data.value: A staged collection of Java assignments built with a strong test-based focus, validating requirements through comprehensive JUnit test suites.

data.name: ContactDesc
data.value: I'm currently looking for a summer internship and new opportunities. Whether you have a question regarding my projects or just want to say hi, I'll try my best to get back to you!
